description: Pathways to economic prosperity, education, and resource management aimed at ensuring holistic wealth generation and employment for all citizens [1, 2].

key_promises: Providing a 'Thaimaman Thanga Mothiram' maternity kit with a gold ring and essential items for every newborn in government hospitals [3].
Implementing the Kamarajar Education Guarantee Scheme, depositing ₹15,000 for students in grades 1-12 to prevent dropouts due to poverty [3].
Increasing the monthly financial assistance for widows and destitute women to ₹3,000 [3].
Launching the 'Singappenngal' development scheme, offering ₹5 Lakh collateral-free loans for women SHGs and entrepreneurs [3].
Ensuring 40% of government procurement for food, clothes, and school supplies is sourced from women's self-help groups and micro-enterprises [3].
Establishing specialized Special Industrial Estates tailored for women's needs in 10 major cities [3].
Creating the 'Rani Velu Nachiyar Force', a 500-member specialized monitoring force equipped with body cameras for women's safety [4].
Integrating an AI-driven Centralized Monitoring Center with panic buttons in public transport and smart CCTV networks [4].
Establishing Special Fast-Track Courts to expedite justice for crimes against women [4].
Building modern hostels for working women and students across Tamil Nadu with a maximum monthly fee capped at ₹2,500 [4].
Providing a Youth Victory Fund offering ₹4,000 monthly for unemployed graduates and ₹2,500 for diploma/ITI holders for two years [5].
Ensuring total transparency in government recruitment and filling all vacancies within one year of notification [5].
Offering ₹20 Lakh collateral-free education loans for higher studies (UG to PhD) under the Education Guarantee Scheme [5].
Facilitating 'Victory Industrial Training' paid internships for 5 lakh youth annually, offering ₹10,000 stipends for graduates [5].
Providing ₹25 Lakh collateral-free loans under the Victory Entrepreneur Scheme [6].
Incentivizing private companies to hire 75% local youth by offering GST and electricity subsidies [6].
Establishing 'Micro Tech Parks' with high-speed internet and co-working spaces in 25 tier-2/tier-3 cities to support remote work [7].
Establishing a Tamil Nadu Sports University with global-standard sports excellence centers [7].
Launching the Tamil Nadu Olympic Scheme, offering up to ₹6 Crore for Olympic gold medalists and world-class training [7].
Building multi-sport stadiums and sports complexes in 10 zonal headquarters [8].
Identifying 500 young athletes at the school level for dedicated Olympic preparation [8].
Promoting coastal sports like Surfing and Kayaking, prioritizing coastal fishing communities [8].
Establishing a 100% Crop Insurance system utilizing agro-meteorological centers for precise loss calculation [9].
Supporting Copra coconut farmers with MSPs and value-added product corporations [9].
Positioning Tamil Nadu as an organic farming leader through a dedicated organic farming scheme and subsidies [9].
Providing free fertilizer for two years to small-scale farmers owning less than 2 acres [10].
Increasing the fishing ban period relief to ₹20,000 and monsoon relief to ₹7,000 [10].
Providing a ₹25 Lakh accident insurance policy for registered fishermen [10].
Increasing diesel subsidies for boats to 3,600 liters and establishing a Minimum Support Price (MSP) for fish [11].
Providing coastal housing schemes, ₹5 Lakh entrepreneurship loans, and inland fishing support [11].
Establishing seaweed parks, deep-sea fishing financial loans, and coastal erosion protection [12].
Allocating ₹5,000 Crore to expedite river interlinking projects across Tamil Nadu [13].
Implementing the 'Neeratchi Scheme' to restore 5 lakh new agricultural ponds [13].
Executing a ₹5,000 Crore Cauvery Delta Eco-restoration project to combat soil degradation and pollution [14].
Providing free goats and cows to 2 lakh families below the poverty line [15].
Raising the milk procurement price to ₹44 per liter and promoting A2 milk production [15].
Modernizing all public schools into smart classrooms with digital libraries and STEM labs by 2031 [16].
Aiming to make Tamil Nadu the #1 state in learning outcomes [16].
Establishing 100 'Kamarajar Special Schools' providing free holistic education for marginalized students [16].
Achieving a 0% dropout rate through AI tracking and integrated educational support [16].
Expanding the morning breakfast scheme up to the 12th standard [17].
Securing 10% horizontal reservation for government school students in all UG courses [17].
Setting up a Periyar Institute of Emerging Technologies (PIET) and introducing AI, VR, and AR modules into school curriculums [17, 18].
Targeting a $1.5 Trillion dollar economy by 2036 [19].
Drafting Industry Transformation Maps for the top 20 sectors and modernizing SIPCOT estates [19].
Implementing a ₹15,000 Crore debt relief fund to support struggling MSMEs [20].
Eliminating peak-hour electricity charges for MSMEs and establishing a ₹1,000 Crore Technology Upgradation Fund [20, 21].
Guaranteeing a 40% priority for MSMEs in government procurement [21].

sections.section_name: Investment Attraction and District Balanced Growth
key_promises: Introducing a strict 21-day clearance guarantee for setting up mega industries and 7-15 days for MSMEs [21].
Creating a specialized Investor Promotion Commission and a Non-Resident Tamil Investor Scheme [22].
Allocating a 'Backward District Development Budget' to eliminate regional disparities [23].
Establishing dedicated tech, textile, aerospace, EV, and food processing hubs categorized into Western, Kurinji, Northern, Central, and Southern zones [23-28].
Supporting 10,000 startups over 5 years with up to ₹50 Lakh funding under 'Start-Smart Tamil Nadu' [29].
Establishing a ₹500 Crore Venture Capital Fund for AI, Deep-Tech, and FinTech startups [29].
Developing EV & Battery Manufacturing zones, a commercial drone corridor, and an i-Tamil FinTech Corridor [30].
Creating an AVGC-XR Creative Economy ecosystem and an aerospace tech hub in Kulasekharapatnam [31].
Transforming Thoothukudi into a Green Hydrogen and green ammonia hub [32].
